title: Attribute Modify Library
description: allows you to easily add or remove from an attributes base value
body:
run the `/function attribute:uninstall` to remove the scoreboards and storage data.

### add value
```
/function attribute:modify {attribute:"generic.max_health",value:10}
```
### remove value
```
/function attribute:modify {attribute:"generic.max_health",value:-10}
```
works with all attributes(haven't tested them all, but it should)

works up to the 6th decimal
```
/function attribute:modify {attribute:"generic.movement_speed",value:0.000055}
```
